summary: Summary: Speaker1 opens the conversation excitedly recounting a surprise proposal when Joe brought them onstage and the cast began clapping; Speaker1 says they were happy and even cried from being overwhelmed (sadness). Speaker2 first reacts with surprise, then becomes excited and happy, vocalizing strong reactions and laughter. The dialogue shifts into planning: Speaker1, still excited and happy, proposes having two weddings including one in Spain; Speaker2, excited and happy, probes honeymoon and grand ideas (Hawaii, renting the Eiffel Tower), expresses surprise and excitement at some suggestions but ultimately rejects certain options and briefly shifts to neutral. Overall the conversation moves from an initially surprised/excited retelling to a happy, excited planning phase with intermittent surprise and neutral moments.
